title: veronica hispidula subsp. hispidula
intro: Veronica hispidula subsp. hispidula, also known as the hairy speedwell or sticky speedwell, is a perennial plant species belonging to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Veronica hispidula subsp. hispidula include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate pain and reduce the risk of infection. Veronica hispidula subsp. hispidula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable addition to traditional herbal remedies.
